title: trls log command
definition_of_done: newLogCmd: --issue, --worker, --since flags. Human-readable with [lost race]. --json JSONL with _lost_race. Registered in main.go. Note: OpAssign case in logPayloadSummary added in E3-004-T8.
outcome: Created cmd/trellis/log.go: newLogCmd with --issue, --worker, --since flags. Human-readable output with [lost race] marker. --json outputs JSONL with _lost_race field. Registered in main.go. logPayloadSummary handles all current op types; OpAssign case to be added in T8.
